justification: Publisher (Macmillan/Metropolitan Books) page for 'Recoding America' explicitly lists Jennifer Pahlka as the author.
CAIS Statement on AI Risk page lists both Yoshua Bengio and is directed by Dan Hendrycks, directly evidencing Bengio signing/promoting this CAIS initiative.
Wikipedia article on Dario Amodei documents his role as VP of Research at OpenAI under Sam Altman before founding Anthropic, establishing the prior collaboration context.
Official Schumer Senate press release explicitly names Schumer, Rounds, Heinrich, and Young as the Bipartisan Senate AI Working Group co-founders releasing the roadmap.
Same Schumer Senate press release explicitly names Schumer and Heinrich as Bipartisan Senate AI Working Group co-founders.
Senator Young's official press release explicitly names Young and Schumer as Bipartisan Senate AI Working Group co-founders releasing the roadmap.
New York Times Hard Fork column/podcast page listing Casey Newton and Kevin Roose as co-hosts.
Official textbook website hosted at UC Berkeley lists Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig as co-authors of 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach'.
Senator Cotton's official press release explicitly names Cotton and Schumer as co-introducers of bipartisan robotics security legislation (American Security Robotics Act).
Senate Democratic Leadership press release explicitly names Schumer and Andy Kim as co-introducers of the MATCH Act.
Same Senate Democratic Leadership press release explicitly names Schumer and Pete Ricketts as co-introducers of the MATCH Act.
Senate Foreign Relations Committee press release explicitly names Risch as a co-introducer of the MATCH Act alongside Schumer.
Senator Schatz's official press release explicitly names Schatz and Kennedy as co-introducers of the AI Labeling Act (S. 2691) on October 24, 2023.
Senator Schatz's official press release explicitly names Schatz and Gardner as co-introducers of the AI in Government Act.

SCSP's official AI+Energy Summit announcement page; Schatz's keynote participation at this event was confirmed via search snippets but is not named on this specific announcement page — best available SCSP-hosted evidence.
